About Me

My name is Bridget McAvoy, and I am a sophomore at Cornell University studying Mechanical & Aerospace Engineering. On campus I’m involved in Cornell Rocketry, the Society of Women in Engineering, and the women’s club hockey team.

Take a look at my projects and CV.
